name: industrial-hmi-scada-lite
description: Portfolio prototype for a TypeScript/.NET industrial HMI/SCADA web application.

scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run check:frontend
scripts.check:frontend: node --check src/hmi-web/apiClient.mjs && node --check src/hmi-web/app.mjs && node --check src/hmi-web/domain.mjs && node --check src/hmi-web/mockTelemetry.mjs && node --check tools/serve.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run restore && npm run build && npm test
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:frontend
